headline: Stripe, Visa, BlackRock Back New Open USD Stablecoin In Bid To Challenge Tether, Circle
summary: A consortium led by companies including Stripe, Visa, BlackRock, Bank of New York Mellon and Coinbase is launching Open USD.

raw.headline: Stripe, Visa, BlackRock Back New Open USD Stablecoin In Bid To Challenge Tether, Circle
raw.summary: A consortium led by companies including Stripe, Visa, BlackRock, Bank of New York Mellon and Coinbase is launching Open USD.

headline: Robinhood Launches Trump Accounts App Ahead Of July 4 Rollout
summary: Robinhood Markets said its Trump Accounts app is now available to eligible U.S. families ahead of the program's official launch on July 4.

raw.headline: Robinhood Launches Trump Accounts App Ahead Of July 4 Rollout
raw.summary: Robinhood Markets said its Trump Accounts app is now available to eligible U.S. families ahead of the program's official launch on July 4.
